articles_feedback.title: What is toilet paper’s right side?
articles_feedback.summary:
The author discusses the proper way to hang toilet paper, and whether it should be hung over or under the roll. They also discuss the pros and cons of each method. 

The author concludes that there is no right or wrong way to hang toilet paper, and that it is simply a matter of personal preference.
articles_feedback.song: The Right Side of Toilet Paper

articles_feedback.title: Spaghetti Bolognese don’t exist!!1!
articles_feedback.summary: The author discusses the origin of spaghetti bolognese and argues that it is not a traditional Italian dish. They also provide some alternative pasta dishes that are more authentically Italian.

articles_feedback.title: Migrate GCP projects across organizations, the gcloud way
articles_feedback.summary: The author provides a step-by-step guide on how to migrate GCP projects across organizations using the gcloud command-line tool. They also discuss some of the challenges they faced during the migration process and how they overcame them.

articles_feedback.title: My favourite Toolchain
articles_feedback.summary: The author discusses their favorite toolchain for software development, which includes Ruby on Rails, Go, and Google Cloud Platform.

articles_feedback.title: Ruby on Rails-like ORM and scaffolding in Golang anyone?
articles_feedback.summary: The author attempts to create a Ruby on Rails-like ORM and scaffolding in Golang. They discuss the challenges they faced and the lessons they learned.

articles_feedback.title: My Mac’s battery on Google Cloud Monitoring — with SMS if its low
articles_feedback.summary: The author shows how to monitor their Mac's battery level using Google Cloud Monitoring and how to set up SMS alerts if the battery level gets too low.

articles_feedback.title: Canary Deployment on GCP with Cloud Deploy
articles_feedback.summary: The author discusses how to perform canary deployments on Google Cloud Platform using Cloud Build and Cloud Deploy. They also provide a step-by-step guide on how to set up a canary deployment.

articles_feedback.title: Setting a ★ Cloud Build trigger with Pulumi in  Python
articles_feedback.summary: The author shows how to set up a Cloud Build trigger using Pulumi and Python. They also provide a code example that you can use to set up your own trigger.

articles_feedback.title: Google Forms to Datastudio
articles_feedback.summary: The author shows how to use Google Forms and Google Datastudio to create a data visualization. They also provide a step-by-step guide on how to set up a data visualization.
